docs.title: Welcome to CyberBreach
docs.text:
For full documentation visit mkdocs.org.

import tensorflow as tf

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Description args Array<string> Command arguments from the terminal data object Contains all the data in your save file location object Contains information about the currently connected server updateTerminal function Function to output messages to the terminal

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: Enter the IP address of the server as an argument to see its money percentage.

docs.title: Example Code
docs.text:
export default function getServerMoneyPercentage(args, data, location, updateTerminal) {
    const targetIp = args;
    const targetServer = data.locations.find(server => server.ip === targetIp);

    if (!targetServer) {
        updateTerminal(`Error: Server with IP ${targetIp} not found.`);
        return;
    }

    const moneyPercentage = (targetServer.money / targetServer.maxmoney) * 100;
    updateTerminal(`Server ${targetServer.name} (${targetIp}) money: ${moneyPercentage.toFixed(2)}%`);
}

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
This function manages the process of disconnecting from a server in the game. It performs three main tasks:

  1. Checks if the player is currently connected to a server
  2. Toggles the market if connected to an owned server
  3. Disconnects from the current server

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text:
Parameter Type Description data object Game state data, including current location updateTerminal function Updates the game terminal with messages

Note

args and location parameters are present in the function signature but not used in the current implementation.

docs.title: 1. Connection Check
docs.text:
if (!data.currentLocation) {
    updateTerminal('Not connected to any server.');
    return;
}

If not connected to any server, the function displays a message and exits.

docs.title: 2. Market Toggle
docs.text:
const currentIP = data.currentLocation.ip;
if (data.locations.find(server => server.ip === currentIP && server.owned)) {
    toggleMarket();
}

Toggles the market if the current server is owned by the player.

docs.title: 3. Disconnect Process
docs.text:
const disconnectedFrom = data.currentLocation.name;
data.currentLocation = null;
updateTerminal(`Disconnected from ${disconnectedFrom}`);

Disconnects from the current server and updates the terminal.

docs.title: Imported Functions
docs.text:
Function Source Purpose toggleMarket ../../data/handler.js Toggles the regular market

Info

toggleBlackMarket and breachEffect are imported but not used in this function.

docs.title: Example Usage
docs.text:
disconnect({}, gameData, currentLocation, updateTerminalFunction);

This will attempt to disconnect from the current server, toggle the market if applicable, and update the game terminal with the result.

docs.title: Source Code
docs.text:
import { toggleBlackMarket, toggleMarket } from "../../data/handler.js";
import { breachEffect } from "../effects/breach.js";

export default function(args, data, location, updateTerminal) {
    if (!data.currentLocation) {
        updateTerminal('Not connected to any server.');
        return;
    }

    const currentIP = data.currentLocation.ip;

    if (data.locations.find(server => server.ip === currentIP && server.owned)) {
        toggleMarket();
    }

    const disconnectedFrom = data.currentLocation.name;
    data.currentLocation = null;
    updateTerminal(`Disconnected from ${disconnectedFrom}`);
}
